metadata.description: Self-illuminating material - maps to Emission in Unity

summary: Makes surface emit light. Blender: emission shader for area lights. Unity: use Base Color + Emission map with emissive material.

parameters.Strength: Emission intensity (HDR value, typically 0-16 or higher)

implementation.base_color: Black (0,0,0) for pure emission, or use color
implementation.material_type: Set to Unlit or use Emission keyword

strength_handling.unity: Multiply color by strength value (Color × Strength)
strength_handling.hdr: Enable HDR color property for values > 1

compatibility_loss_15_percent: Blender emission affects global illumination; Unity emission is mostly visual except in baked GI
typical_use: Light sources, neon, screens, fire, energy effects
